name: model-lab-skills
description: Reproducible model training, evaluation, intervention, and runtime research workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Train, inspect, evaluate, and deploy language models.
interface.longDescription: Plan reproducible model experiments, prepare datasets, fine-tune and compare checkpoints, research representations and steering, evaluate jailbreak and tool-use behavior, and choose or benchmark Apple model runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Design a reproducible language-model experiment before spending compute.
Compare these model checkpoints without hiding behavioral or runtime regressions.
Choose the right Core AI, Core ML, MLX, ExecuTorch, or Foundation Models path.
